- [ ] `npx vitest run src/` passes (unit tests)
- [ ] New adapter has a corresponding E2E test (see [TESTING.md](./TESTING.md))
- [ ] YAML adapter passes `opencli validate` (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
